name: VeloPlatformApplication
description: Tracks platform onboarding and application packets within the VELO ecosystem.

platform_profile_id.description: The ID of the linked platform profile.

target_department.description: Target department like freelance, crypto, trade.

status.description: Current status: draft, pending_review, approved, ready_for_manual_submission, submitted_manually, active, failed, blocked_missing_info, archived.

stage.description: Internal onboarding stage: discovery, profiling, reviewing, staging, final.

generated_fields.description: Safe pre-populated form fields from Clone Bay and Vault labels.

approval_mission_id.description: ID of the linked Autopilot mission for final approval.

risk_level.description: Assessed risk level for this platform application.

submission_mode.description: Mode of submission, usually manual or staged.

failure_reason.description: Reason for application failure or block.

last_status_at.description: Timestamp of the last status update.

submitted_at.description: Timestamp when the manual submission was confirmed/recorded.
